expo.name: LinkCode
expo.description: Every Code Agent in the Palm of your hand.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LinkCode needs camera access to attach photos or scan coding-session connection details.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LinkCode needs photo library access to attach images to coding-agent conversations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: LinkCode needs permission to save generated images or artifacts to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: LinkCode needs local network access to discover and connect to your local LinkCode daemon.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: LinkCode needs document access to attach files to coding-agent conversations.
infoPlist.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: LinkCode needs downloads folder access to save coding-agent artifacts.
